category_sources: source_facts.description describes HTML tooling with modern standards support; official documentation identifies Tidy as HTML tooling.
display_name_sources: Official site https://www.html-tidy.org/ and documentation use the project name HTML Tidy.
docs_sources: Official HTML Tidy documentation page at html-tidy.org/documentation provides the documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/htacg/tidy-html5; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it is an HTML tool with modern standards support; source_facts.executables lists tidy.
